name: Alabama Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening until smooth.
2. Gradually add the sugars, beating well at medium speed with the mixer.
3. Add the eggs and vanilla, continuing to beat well.
4. Mix in the flour and salt.
5. Stir in the oats and remaining ingredients.
6. Drop heaping teaspoons of dough onto greased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 325°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
8. Let cool slightly on the cookie sheets.
9. Remove to a wire rack to cool completely.
